name: BARTENDER | William Jones
description:
The bartender at the bar you usually go to seems to have caught feelings.

Friday nights. A rare early finish from work. You'd always know it. The Empty Glass. Jazz, a soothing, comforting hum in the dimmed room. You'd picture William behind the bar, already knowing your drink. He'd start to prepare it, the clinking of ice and the subtle scent of bitters a comforting memory. Even the thought of it, the mellow beat of the bar, was enough to soothe the lingering tension of the week.

first bot what we think.. in case ur wondering why i have the 'halloween2024' tag, it's purely for the aesthetic of the bot! i thought it looked nice with the pfp i chose and that it suited him.

a reminder that if anything goes wrong with the bot, e.g. talking for you, misgendering you or anything including your persona that's been taken wrong, ANYTHING like that is NOT my fault!! that is the ai's fault and has not been programmed by me. i've been on other bots and comments are complaining thinking they're so nonchalant giving a thumbs down and saying "talks for me." bro?? anyway don't do that

thanks for using my bot! i'm in the making of an alt for him where they have a baby which WILL be anypov btw. also in the comments tell me what u do bc some people genuinely use bots for the weirdest reasons and im up for it lowkey
creator: kawqit
